Wallet for Aergo Mainnet, Testnet, and private networks

Aergo Connect 3.0 is the officially supported wallet as a browser extension.

The browser wallet has built-in management of native Aergo tokens on the network and provides access to functions like staking and voting

FEATURES

- Local encrypted private key storage: your credentials never leave your computer.
- Manage accounts on multiple Aergo blockchains
- Send transactions: Both value transfers as well as contract calls, with special support for governance transactions
- Export and Import of encrypted keystore files
- DApp API: interact with enabled websites
- TX: Transfer coins, tokens, call smart contracts, with support for governance TXs
- Staking & Voting
- Token, NFT (ARC1, ARC2 based)

OPEN SOURCE

Aergo Connect 3.0 is open source. You can verify the source code and build the extension yourself here: https://github.com/aergoio/aergo-connect-3.0

ISSUES

Please report issues and feature requests here: https://github.com/aergoio/aergo-connect-3.0/issues

For security related reports, please contact us at security@aergo.io
Simulate human typing in Google Docs at 10–50 WPM with realistic breaks and mistakes.

⭐ What EzzyTyper Does
-Types text into editors (like Google Docs) at 10–50 WPM with natural jitter.
-Inserts deliberate mistakes based on accuracy settings (kept in the text).
-Adds micro-breaks (short pauses) and long breaks (minutes away).
-Generates random backspaces (stumbles, not corrections).
-Shows a live status bar: progress %, ETA, mistakes, and break timers.
-Works inside Docs’ iframe + other textareas/contenteditables.
-Toggle panel with Ctrl + Shift + E.

⚙️ Key Features

-Human pace: 10–50 WPM, half-word hesitations optional.
-Accuracy slider: Choose how many words get subtle typos.
-Breaks:
-Micro-breaks: frequency + duration sliders.
-Long breaks: every N minutes, random duration.
-Stumbles: Random backspaces (0–30%) without fixing.
-Dual UI: Expanded (sliders) or Minimal (big buttons + status line).
-Privacy-first: No analytics, no servers, no data leaves your browser.

🛠️ Use Cases

-Demos & recordings — show “human typing” in real time.
-Testing — simulate real users’ keystrokes in input fields.
-Dictation cleanup — replay text at a human pace.
-Content replays — simulate writing sessions.

Millisecond timestamps, jump-to-timestamp, interval timer A→B, ms toggle button, one-click copy, watch time stats

YouTube Milliseconds Timer adds millisecond precision to YouTube's video player and a full set of tools for anyone who needs to work with video time precisely — editors, researchers, educators, content creators, and sport analysts.

FEATURES

Millisecond-accurate timestamps
Displays time in M:SS.mmm format (e.g. 1:23.456) directly in the YouTube player. No overlays, no clutter — replaces the native timestamp seamlessly. Toggle milliseconds on/off from the popup or directly in the player control bar.

One-click timestamp copy
A small copy button appears next to the time display. Click it to instantly copy the exact timestamp to your clipboard — great for notes, subtitles, video editing, or sharing precise moments.

Jump to timestamp (press G)
Press G — or click the target button in the player — and a small input appears, pre-filled with the current timestamp. Edit the digits you need and press Enter: the video jumps to that exact moment with millisecond precision. Accepts SS.mmm, M:SS.mmm, and H:MM:SS.mmm formats.

Milliseconds toggle button
A dedicated button in the player control bar toggles millisecond display on and off without opening the popup. Two visual states (active / dimmed) make the current mode obvious. Synchronises in both directions with the popup setting.

Interval Timer (A → B)
Mark two points on any video and instantly see the exact time difference between them, down to the millisecond. Press [ to set point A, ] to set point B — or use the A/B buttons in the player controls. The result appears in a floating badge above the controls. Copy the interval delta with one click. Visual markers on the progress bar show your selected range.

Per-button visibility controls
Each player-bar button (copy, milliseconds toggle, jump, interval A/B) can be individually shown or hidden from the popup, so you keep only the controls you actually use.

Watch time statistics
Track your YouTube viewing habits with a full stats dashboard in the popup:
• Total watch time across all sessions
• Today's watch time
• Daily average — calculated over 7 days, 30 days, or all time
• 7-day bar chart showing your recent activity
• Monthly calendar heatmap with color-coded intensity per day
Navigate back through previous months to see historical data.

PRIVACY

No accounts. No tracking. No data leaves your device. All stats are stored locally in your browser using Chrome's built-in storage. The extension never accesses the clipboard without an explicit user action.
A chrome extension that modifies twitter/x.com links to vxtwitter/fxtwitter on Copy/shortcut Ctrl+Shift+K and copies to clipboard.

Modifies twitter/x.com links to vxtwitter/fxtwitter. Use the keyboard shortcut ctrl+shift+K/cmd+shift+K to copy a twiiter link as vxtwiiter/fxtwitter link.

Why this?
Twitter link embeds in discord are often broken these days and it's annoying to edit each link manually whenever you want to share a twiiter link on discord, so this extension helps you use vxtwitter links to fix embeds with ease.

How to use?
Step1: Install the extension.
Step2: Go to any twitter.com url, and press Ctrl + Shift + K. And that's it. The extension will copy the link as a "vxtwiiter/fxtwitter" link and you can share the link to discord without thinking twice about embed fails.

How to switch between vxtwitter and fxtwitter?
By default the extension uses "vxtwitter/fxtwitter" links. You can enable the option "Enable fxtwitter" from the extension popup to use fxtwitter links instead of vxtwitter.

How to get modified links on copy (Ctrl + C) shortcut directly?
By default, the extension only modifies links on custom shortuct (Ctrl+Shift+K). You can enable the option modify on copy from the extension popup to let the bot use modified links on copy shortuct (Ctrl+C) directly.

Note: If the modified url is not working when you use the Ctrl+Shift+K shortcut, manually register the shortcut by following the below steps.
1. Go to "chrome://extensions/shortcuts"
2. Look for xify extension
3. Click on the edit icon for the "copy to clipboard" option and press "Ctrl+Shift+k"


Have any issues or need help with using the extension?
Join the discord support server: https://discord.gg/S3hhw9kSKV

A web element locator tool for XPath and CSS selectors with real-time highlighting and property extraction features.

# XPath Locator

## Overview
XPath Locator is a professional web element locator tool designed specifically for automation testers and web scraping developers. It provides multiple locating methods, real-time highlighting, property extraction, and history tracking features to make element location more efficient.

## Key Features

### 1. Multiple Locating Methods
- XPath (both relative and absolute paths)
- CSS Selectors
- JavaScript Path
- jQuery Selectors
- TestRigor Path
- Index-based XPath
- ID, Name, Class, and other attributes

### 2. Real-time Element Inspection
- Click the inspect button to highlight elements on mouse hover
- Real-time display of element properties
- HTML preview support
- Visual element highlighting

### 3. Smart Locator Generation
- Automatically generates optimized locator expressions
- Supports both relative and absolute paths
- Optimized locating strategies for different element types
- Intelligent parent-child relationship analysis

### 4. Quick Copy Features
- One-click copy for any locator expression
- Copy element's complete HTML structure
- Context menu integration for quick copying
- Clipboard operation with success notifications

### 5. Validation & Testing
- Built-in XPath syntax validation
- CSS selector syntax checking
- Real-time element finding and highlighting
- Immediate feedback on locator validity

### 6. History Tracking
- Automatically saves frequently used locators
- Quick access to previous searches
- History management with clear functionality

### 7. User-Friendly Interface
- Clean and intuitive sidebar panel
- Easy-to-use inspection mode
- Clear property organization
- Responsive design

## Use Cases
- Selenium test automation
- Playwright script development
- Web scraping projects
- UI test automation
- Element property analysis
- DOM structure inspection

## Technical Details
- Supports all modern browsers
- Lightweight and performance-optimized
- No external dependencies
- Cross-origin compatible
- Real-time processing

## Support
For bug reports or feature requests, please visit our GitHub repository or contact our support team.

Note: This extension is designed for development and testing purposes. Please ensure you have necessary permissions when using it on web pages.

Firefly is a quick tool to switch reading mode, supporting dark mode, eye protection mode, and easy reading.

Firefly is an efficient and practical tool for switching reading modes. Its emergence has addressed the issue of reading fatigue that many users experience when reading long articles. The tool aims to provide a more comfortable reading experience, dedicated to reducing the visual pressure on readers to improve reading efficiency and enjoy the pleasure of reading.

Firefly specially designs several reading modes for users to choose from. Among them, the dark mode can effectively alleviate eye fatigue when reading in low-light environments. The eye care mode is designed to reduce the harsh blue light from the screen, providing a more comfortable reading environment for you. These modes can be easily switched with one click, ensuring a smooth transition and seamless connection with almost no delay.

Firefly does not position itself merely as a reading tool; it hopes to provide more convenience to users during the reading process. In addition to switching reading modes, there are many other reading features waiting for users to explore.

🚀 Release v2.1.0 — Clipboard Copy & Stability🚀
     ----------------------------------------------------------------------
⚡️ Copy Element Data Instantly
As requested, this feature is now available! Press Ctrl+C (or Cmd+C on Mac) while hovering any element to copy its inspection data directly to your clipboard — no extra clicks needed. 
You can then easily paste (Ctrl+V / Cmd+V) the copied data directly into Notepad, text editors, or any other files.

⚙️ Configure What Gets Copied
Open the gear menu to set your copy preferences. Choose exactly which data fields are included when you copy, so your clipboard always has what you need.

✅ Visual Copy Confirmation
Copied fields stay highlighted in the tooltip so you always know which element's data is on your clipboard — even as you keep inspecting.

🛠️ Stability Improvements
Fixed multiple reliability issues in the clipboard pipeline and message handling that could cause silent failures. Copy now works consistently across all pages and tab states.

Like Ctrl + F, but with the features you wish it had

Similar to the "Find on page" (Ctrl + F) tool within Chrome, this extension allows users to enter search terms and see the matching text on the current webpage highlighted. The difference is, this extension supports many features that the "Find on page" tool does not such as:

- Case sensitive search
- Regular expression search
- Copy matching terms to clipboard

Why use this extension over other similar extensions? This extension checks for matches within HTML elements that other extensions don't support like:

- input
- textarea
- shadow DOM
- frameset

FAQ

Q: How do I open this extension?
A: You can open this extension by clicking on the Extensions menu in the toolbar of your browser and then clicking "Findr", or by using the quick key: Ctrl + Shift + F

Q: What do I enter in the search box?
A: You can choose to enter plain text like you would with Chrome's "Find on page" tool, or you can enter regular expressions. This extension supports JavaScript regular expressions. For more information on writing JavaScript regular expression please visit their documentation: https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/JavaScript/Guide/Regular_expressions#writing_a_regular_expression_pattern

Q: Why aren't matching terms being highlighted?
A: If there are matching terms on the webpage that are not being highlighted, please reload the webpage and try again. If the issue persists please reach out to findr.extension@gmail.com

Multi-language TOTP (2FA) code manager that auto-fills one-time codes on verification forms.

English

Auto OTP Authenticator is a lightweight, privacy-focused TOTP (Time-based One-Time Password) manager for your browser. It generates one-time codes, helps you organize accounts, and can fill them into common 2FA / verification forms—so you don’t have to reach for your phone for every login.

After setup, TOTP codes are computed entirely on your device using the Web Crypto API. Secrets stay in your browser profile by default. There are no analytics servers, no telemetry, and no tracking from this extension.

What it supports

TOTP codes (RFC 6238) — typically 6 or 8 digits, 30-second (or custom) steps, HMAC-SHA1 or HMAC-SHA-256
Automatic detection & fill — supports single-field and multi-box OTP layouts
Domain-aware accounts — matches and prioritizes accounts per website
Popup workflow — search, filter, copy, delete, last-used priority
Keyboard shortcuts — copy/fill without opening popup
QR & otpauth — scan from page (including iframes) or import from image
Import & export — JSON backup/restore
Appearance — light/dark/system theme
Optional Chrome sync — stores data in Google sync (optional)
Languages — English, Turkish, German, Spanish, Italian

Privacy & security

Default: chrome.storage.local
Codes generated locally
No backend servers
Export backups manually
Not a replacement for hardware keys (e.g., YubiKey)



Turkish (Türkçe)

Auto OTP Authenticator, tarayıcınızda kullanabileceğiniz hafif ve gizlilik odaklı bir TOTP (zaman tabanlı tek kullanımlık şifre) yöneticisidir. Kod üretir, hesapları organize eder ve 2FA doğrulama alanlarına otomatik doldurur.

Kurulumdan sonra kodlar yalnızca cihazınızda Web Crypto API ile hesaplanır. Secret bilgiler tarayıcı profilinizde kalır. Analiz, takip veya telemetri yoktur.

Neleri destekler?

TOTP (RFC 6238) — 6/8 hane, 30 sn step, SHA1 / SHA256
Otomatik doldurma — tek alan & multi-box OTP
Domain bazlı hesap eşleşmesi
Popup üzerinden arama / filtre / kopyalama
Kısayollar — popup açmadan işlem
QR / otpauth tarama (iframe dahil)
JSON export/import
Tema seçenekleri
Chrome sync (opsiyonel)
Çok dil desteği

Gizlilik ve güvenlik

Depolama: chrome.storage.local
Kodlar local üretilir
Backend yok
Manuel yedekleme

Format card lists from LimitlessTCG for easier copying to Cardmarket

LimitlessTCG to Cardmarket – Effortless Decklist Formatting for Cardmarket

Are you a trading card game player who builds decks on LimitlessTCG and wants to quickly buy cards on Cardmarket? This extension is for you!

★ What does it do?
LimitlessTCG to Cardmarket is a simple, powerful Chrome extension that lets you instantly format decklists from LimitlessTCG (including both Pokémon and One Piece) into a clean, Cardmarket-friendly format. With just one click, you can copy your decklist—complete with card names, counts, and even Pokémon abilities and attacks—ready to paste directly into Cardmarket’s buylist or anywhere else you need.

★ How it works:
1. Visit a supported decklist page on LimitlessTCG (Pokémon or One Piece).
2. Click the extension icon and open the popup.
3. The extension automatically detects the deck type and enables the “Format & Copy List” button.
4. Click the button—your decklist is instantly formatted and copied to your clipboard.
5. Paste the list into Cardmarket or any other platform.

★ Key Features:
- Automatic Detection: Instantly recognizes if you’re on a supported LimitlessTCG decklist page (Pokémon or One Piece).
- Smart Formatting: For Pokémon, includes card names, counts, and even parses abilities and attack names for each card (excluding basic energies and generic trainers). For One Piece, formats names and set codes for easy Cardmarket import.
- Clipboard Ready: One click copies the formatted list to your clipboard—no manual editing required.
- Fallback Support: Works even if your browser restricts clipboard access, using a reliable fallback method.
- User Feedback: Clear status messages let you know when a deck is detected, copied, or if there’s an error.

★ Why use this extension?
Save Time: No more manual reformatting or copy-pasting card by card.
Reduce Errors: Consistent, reliable formatting means fewer mistakes when buying or sharing lists.
Stay Focused: Spend less time on logistics and more time building, testing, and playing your decks.

★ Supported Sites:
Pokémon: https://limitlesstcg.com/decks/list/*
One Piece: https://onepiece.limitlesstcg.com/decks/list/*

★ How to Use:
1. Go to a decklist page on LimitlessTCG.
2. Click the extension icon.
3. Click “Format & Copy List.”
4. Paste your formatted list into Cardmarket or anywhere you need.

★ Privacy and Permissions:
The extension only runs on supported LimitlessTCG decklist pages.
Clipboard access is used solely to copy your formatted decklist—no data is collected or transmitted.

★ Open Source and Feedback:
This extension is open source. Check out the code, suggest features, or report issues on GitHub (link in the extension details).
